nasb.text: and whoever sits on the thing on which the man with the discharge has been sitting, shall wash his clothes and bathe in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: And whoever sits on anything on which the one with the discharge has sat shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 誰坐了有異常排泄的人所坐過的家具，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 凡坐他坐过之物的人都不洁净，必须洗衣、沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
